generated.findings: Both lungs are clear and expanded. Heart and mediastinum normal. Calcified densities within the right paratracheal region and left perihilar region, may represent calcified granulomas. Round opacity measuring 2 cm in diameter within the posterior mediastinum.
generated.impression: No active disease. Recommend further evaluation of the round opacity with chest CT with IV contrast.
generated.recommendation: Further evaluation with chest CT with IV contrast
generated.disclaimer: Clinical uncertainty due to low agreement score (0.40)
